_source: Babylonian lunar-eclipse omens (Enuma Anu Enlil celestial-omen tradition); cf. the Old Babylonian lunar-eclipse tablets ed. A. R. George, Babylonian Divinatory Texts (CUSAS 18), 2013, nos. 13-14.
_note: The eclipse read by watch, by the direction in which it clears, and by month/day. Parallels the 'celestial' branch of the Ugaritic omen tablet (sheep_birth_omens.json).

general.morning watch: signifies the end of a dynasty (or recovery from sickness)
general.obscured from center and clears suddenly: king will die; destruction of Elam
general.remains obscured until daylight: eclipse pertaining to the whole world

Nisannu.day 14: downfall of the king of Akkad; city and people will be safe
Nisannu.day 15: famine; people will trade their infant children for silver
Nisannu.day 19: redness of moon is orange-hued; abundance for the people
Nisannu.day 20: king will declare war on king

Ayyaru.day 14: all-powerful king will die; land will perish
Ayyaru.day 15: king and people are safe; war declared; shortfall of barley
Ayyaru.day 16: king of Amurru will die; his people will perish

Simanu.day 14: famous king will die; a prince will seize the throne; cities depopulated
Simanu.day 15: king of Amurru’s servants will kill him in revolt
Simanu.day 16: king will fall in battle; watercourse will dry up

Dumuzi.day 14: inundation reduces barley; large people seek refuge among smaller ones
Dumuzi.day 16: evil in the land; bounty lost

Abu.day 14: famine; king of Amurru will die
Abu.day 15: Nergal will devour; fatalities in the land
Abu.day 16: ewes will not bring lambs to term

Elul.day 14: king’s brother will seize throne in a revolt
Elul.day 15: king’s son will kill father and seize the throne
Elul.day 16: king of the upper land will enter deserted land

Tashritu.day 14: attack by Elam on my land; agriculture will thrive
Tashritu.day 15: locust swarm will arise in spring and strike crops
Tashritu.day 16: king will die; dynasty over; land will be at war

Kislimu.day 14: attack by Gutian army; people will perish
Kislimu.day 16: king’s auxiliaries and troops will turn hostile to him
Kislimu.day 20: fog and constant rumbles of thunder

Tebetu.day 14: Adad will devastate men, livestock, and wild animals for one year
Tebetu.day 16: king without claim will seize throne; war
Tebetu.day 20: a people that experienced deportation will return home
Tebetu.day 21: king of a lost people will return home

Addaru.day 14: dogs will go mad and bite people
Addaru.day 15: lions will rampage and cut off traffic
Addaru.day 16: an undefeated land will be defeated
Addaru.day 21: Gutian army will conquer the land of Akkad

Leap-Addaru.day 14: hard times; people will trade infant children for silver
Leap-Addaru.day 16: land of Akkad will be resettled

meteorite; Moon-god sets in angry mood.Nisannu day 16: an important city will be conquered
